title: Inzecta's Cool Pack
description:
Semi-public kitchen sink pack mostly meant for my friends. Download if you want but do not expect a polished experience. I plan to improve it over time though.

Disclaimer: I do not own any mods in this pack. All rights to respective owners.
body:
This is a modpack meant for a private server and uploaded to modrinth for ease of updating and distribution.

This modpack contains mods that I personally find cool and interesting such as Ad Astra, Create, Ars Nouveau and more. 

What this pack is: 
A semi-private pack meant for friends that will be updated and improved over time.

What this pack is not:
A polished, fully featured experience. No quests, no progression, and no goals other than the goals the players create for themselves. Bugs may occur and QoL mods may be missing.
